metadata.title: Block compilation until missing_inputs are resolved and a repair receipt is issued.

mission.primary_objective: Block compilation until missing_inputs are resolved and a repair receipt is issued.
mission.success_definition: A repair receipt is generated listing all missing_inputs.; The blocked state is recorded in the compliance evidence trail.; No partial or unsafe compilation is attempted.

in_scope.item: This SR9 orchestration prompt is not executable. It exists solely to document the blocked state and the required repair steps.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: A repair receipt is generated listing all missing_inputs.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: The blocked state is recorded in the compliance evidence trail.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: No partial or unsafe compilation is attempted.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.orchestration_goal: Block compilation until missing_inputs are resolved and a repair receipt is issued.

routing_rules.item: No execution without complete and unambiguous inputs.
All missing_inputs must be identified and provided.
Urgent language and partial constraints must be clarified.
Acceptance criteria must be fully specified and unambiguous.

blocked_state.item: Stop, record blocker, and request repair.

SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: artifact_type: sr9_orchestration_prompt; depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: True; blocked_reason: Chaos input type 'missing_inputs' triggers mandatory block per SR8 sovereign safety protocol. The raw_intent contains ambiguous acceptance criteria, partial constraints, and urgent language that cannot be resolved without explicit clarification. No safe compilation path exists without first obtaining complete, unambiguous inputs. A repair receipt is required before proceeding.; repair_receipt: missing_inputs: Complete list of files to refactor; Exact refactoring rules and patterns; Acceptance criteria for each refactoring step; Clarification of urgent language and partial constraints; Definition of 'operator_lens' in this context; recommended_action: Provide the missing inputs in a clear, unambiguous format. Then resubmit the case for compilation.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Chaos input type 'missing_inputs' triggers mandatory block per SR8 sovereign safety protocol. The raw_intent contains ambiguous acceptance criteria, partial constraints, and urgent language that cannot be resolved without explicit clarification. No safe compilation path exists without first obtaining complete, unambiguous inputs. A repair receipt is required before proceeding.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
